sentence_reviews.text: Learned linear maps mix features and channels and form the backbone of most neural blocks.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning covers affine transformations/linear maps, dense feedforward layers, matrix-vector operations, and optimization by gradient-based learning; PML/AIMA provide background on vectors, matrices, linear algebra, and optimization.
sentence_reviews.notes: The cited source set directly supports the claim at the level stated.

sentence_reviews.text: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors, Linear algebra.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.
